title: Cabinets Unexplored
description: Custom textures for some Every Compat blocks for use in modpacks
body:
The pack adds custom textures to some [Every Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat) generated blocks, originally for my modpack Venturecraft. Feel free to use it in your own modpacks as well!

**Current textures:**

Wood Types:
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) wood types (The original scope of the pack, hence the name).
- [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) Pale Oak.
- [Pale Garden Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/pale-garden-backport) Pale Oak.
- [End's Phantasm](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-phantasm) Pream.
- [Hellion's Sniffer+](https://modrinth.com/mod/hellions-sniffer+) Stone Pine.

Block Types:
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cabinets.
- [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs) tables.
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) shrubs.

**Planned additions:**
- Animated Brimwood Cabinet and Table.
- Support for recent Regions Unexplored versions.

Thanks to UHQ-GAMES, Lyof, and HellionGames for letting me use your woodsets as references for the style of the cabinets, you're amazing!

Be sure to check out the creators of all those mods, they've done some amazing work!
